BLOCKED-START-REQUIRED.summary: Run the local bootstrap launcher to initialize and continue governance session routing.

BLOCKED-MISSING-COMMANDS-HOME.summary: Repair commands_home binding or set COMMANDS_HOME environment variable.

BLOCKED-MISSING-BINDING-FILE.summary: Repair installer outputs, then re-run bootstrap.

BLOCKED-WORKSPACE-PERSISTENCE.summary: Backfill repo-scoped persistence artifacts for the active repo.

BLOCKED-AMBIGUOUS-PROFILE.summary: Resolve profile ambiguity with explicit numbered selection.
